judge_reason: Description B invents specific quoted text ('DI TER', 'TIRED', etc.) and details (signature, date '7/17/52') not mentioned in Description A, and both quote the same visual element (the encoded message) but with contradictory verbatim content.
original_image_tags: A single sheet of aged, light-blue graph paper filled with handwritten text in pencil. The text is arranged in rows of what appears to be a substitution cipher or coded message, with numerical keys written above some of the letter groups. The paper shows signs of age with slight yellowing and a few small stains.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A lined notebook page with handwritten cipher-like text arranged in rows, with alphabetic groups and numbers written above and below each word; two small handwritten signatures/marks appear near the bottom corners.*
